name: kinic-skill-recorder
description: Record Codex skill run evidence and run Codex-driven Kinic skill evolution jobs through kinic-vfs-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Record and evolve Kinic skills from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides skill-only Codex workflows for recording skill run evidence and using Codex to process Kinic skill evolution jobs through kinic-vfs-cli and the shared Python runner, without MCP or a Codex App Server runner.
defaultPrompt: Use kinic-record-skill-run to record evidence for a skill that affected this task.
Use kinic-evolve-skill-job to process a queued Kinic skill evolution job with Codex.
